name: RPlog_Doril_Farnsworth_Commits_High_Treason
title: Doril Farnsworth Commits High Treason
summary: Aboard his privateer carrier Purgatory in hostile space, the New Republic's most-wanted fugitive Axel Vichten receives a guest: Korbel, who reveals himself to be the NRI Assistant Director Doril Farnsworth, the very man whose agents have been hunting him. Farnsworth proposes treason, offering to call off his hounds, secure Axel a senatorial pardon, and trade information and friendship, in exchange for help building his own private armada, specifically the firepower of one of Axel's skipray blastboats. He proves his sincerity by showing Axel a datapad order recalling the agents pursuing him. The cynical Axel, distrustful of any stranger's word and unimpressed by the NRI, weighs whether the offer is worth more than simply selling Farnsworth to the Empire. Refusing to decide on the spot, Axel confines his guest to a comfortable but communications-locked deck aboard the Purgatory, leaving Farnsworth's fate, guest or prisoner, hanging while he considers the deal overnight.
